sentences.arabic: كَانَ نَادِرٌ يَقُولُ لِنَفْسِهِ «أَنَا لَا أَسْتَطِيعُ» قَبْلَ أَنْ يُحَاوِلَ.
sentences.translation: Nadir je govorio sebi "ja ne mogu" prije nego što bi pokušao.
sentences.translationEn: Nadir used to say to himself "I cannot" before he even tried.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يُغَيِّرَ هَذِهِ الْعَادَةَ وَيَقُولَ «سَأُحَاوِلُ».
sentences.translation: Odlučio je da promijeni ovu naviku i kaže "pokušaću".
sentences.translationEn: He decided to change this habit and say "I will try".

sentences.arabic: حَاوَلَ وَأَخْطَأَ ثُمَّ حَاوَلَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Pokušao je, pogriješio, pa pokušao ponovo.
sentences.translationEn: He tried, made mistakes, then tried again.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ نَجَحَ وَشَعَرَ بِفَخْرٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju je uspio i osjetio veliki ponos.
sentences.translationEn: In the end he succeeded and felt great pride.
